title: Anvil On a Stick
description: Turns the Mace into what it really is.
body:
This resource pack gives maces a 3D model, turning it into what it's mechanic feels like, an anvil on a stick. This also changes the sounds of the weapon, along with the model of the heavy core.
![Mace and Heavy Core being showcased.](https://i.imgur.com/vuMde58.gif)
